items.title: Demand Engine Control Tower
items.description: Demand Engine Control Tower exists to Reduce handoff and attribution noise in the demand engine so marketing can create more qualified pipeline without scaling manual ops work. The quarter concentrates on workflow automation, AI-assisted support deflection, and stronger operating transparency so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase marketing-sourced pipeline by strengthening routing, approval, and pipeline-risk workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase efficiency by strengthening routing, approval, and pipeline-risk workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase annual platform value realized by strengthening routing, approval, and pipeline-risk workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Stage-gated workflow orchestration with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Cross-functional approval workspace with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Forecasting and scenario planning with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Pipeline risk intelligence with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Seller Workflow Workspace Web Workspace.
Introduced workflow updates in Seller Workflow Workspace Mobile App.
Introduced workflow updates in Seller Workflow Workspace Dashboard.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Demand Engine Control Tower: operating discovery

items.title: Support Resolution & Knowledge Hub
items.description: Support Resolution & Knowledge Hub exists to Tighten intake, triage, and guided resolution so support organizations protect retention while lowering resolution drag and avoidable rework. The quarter concentrates on workflow automation, AI-assisted support deflection, and stronger operating transparency so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase customer retention protected by service by strengthening case intake, triage, and knowledge-assisted resolution workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase resolution quality by strengthening case intake, triage, and knowledge-assisted resolution workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase annual platform value realized by strengthening case intake, triage, and knowledge-assisted resolution workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Order-to-booking integration with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Structured handoff package with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Workflow telemetry with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended AI copilot for sales execution with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Commercial Intelligence Hub Web Workspace.
Introduced workflow updates in Commercial Intelligence Hub Dashboard.
Introduced workflow updates in Commercial Intelligence Hub API.
